name: react-native-cpp-blur
description: High-performance cross-platform Gaussian blur for React Native with C++/NEON SIMD optimizations
author: jaoCorreia

scripts.test:cpp: cd blur-core && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DBLUR_BUILD_TESTS=ON && cmake --build . && ctest --output-on-failure
scripts.benchmark: cd blur-core && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBLUR_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=ON && cmake --build . && ./blur-bench --benchmark_min_time=0.2s --benchmark_repetitions=10 --benchmark_report_aggregates_only=true
